focus: Close the remaining 41 classifications, finish the 242-finding tally, and convert the live STILL_OPEN set into synthesis-ready remediation clusters for the 015 restart.

graphEvents.detail: The remaining graph-metadata parser, reducer/dashboard alias, and deferred schema-leniency tails all move out of UNKNOWN status on current main; they are no longer live blockers and classify to ADDRESSED.

The residual test-gap and minor doc-history tails mostly target superseded fixture shapes or packet-history drift that later phase 017-018 work already displaced, so they collapse into SUPERSEDED rather than new backlog.

The live backlog remains capped at 19 findings and is now organized into six restart-ready clusters: DB path boundaries, advisor degraded-state surfacing, resume minimal-mode contract repair, review-graph contract repair, doc parity cleanup, and save/startup hygiene.
Classification is complete at 242 of 242 with UNVERIFIED=0, leaving iteration 009 free to draft review-report.md and delta-report-2026-04.md directly from the clustered ledger.
